message:
Add ConnectionMonitor to detect dead Socket Mode WebSocket

Scribble's Slack Socket Mode connection can silently die (EPIPE + pong
timeout) without the process exiting. Bolt's auto-reconnect handles
transient failures but can give up silently, leaving scribble deaf
while the Docker healthcheck (process-level only) passes.

ConnectionMonitor listens to Socket Mode lifecycle events (connected,
disconnected, reconnecting, close, error) and exits the process if the
connection stays down longer than a 5-minute grace period, allowing
ECS to restart the task.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
